name: Social Media Manager
description: AI-powered social media scheduling platform. Schedule posts to LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube. Generate content with AI, A/B test, track analytics.

auth.instructions: Login with email/password to get access_token, then use Authorization: Bearer <token>

capabilities.name: content-scheduling
capabilities.description: Schedule social media posts across 5 platforms with per-platform customization

capabilities.name: multi-platform-publishing
capabilities.description: Publish to LinkedIn, X/Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube with real API integration

capabilities.name: ai-content-generation
capabilities.description: Generate captions, hashtags, calendars, and adapt content per platform using AI

capabilities.name: analytics
capabilities.description: Track cross-platform engagement, forecast performance, analyze cohorts

capabilities.name: a-b-testing
capabilities.description: Create content variants, auto-select winners by engagement metrics

capabilities.name: social-listening
capabilities.description: Monitor brand mentions and sentiment across platforms

capabilities.name: content-repurposing
capabilities.description: Transform content across formats (blog → thread → carousel → reel)

capabilities.name: bulk-operations
capabilities.description: Schedule, cancel, or update multiple posts at once

examples.description: Schedule a post to LinkedIn and X
Generate AI captions for multiple platforms
